'''thakada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docblock|docblock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docblock|docblock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thakada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thækædæth|thækædæth]] || [[word:thækædæj|thækædæj]] || [[word:thækædæsh|thækædæsh]] || [[word:thækædæ|thækædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakakadath|thakakadath]] || [[word:thakakadaj|thakakadaj]] || [[word:thakakadash|thakakadash]] || [[word:thakakada|thakakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadath|thakadath]] || [[word:thakadaj|thakadaj]] || [[word:thakadash|thakadash]] || [[word:thakada|thakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakafdath|thakafdath]] || [[word:thakafdaj|thakafdaj]] || [[word:thakafdash|thakafdash]] || [[word:thakafdaf|thakafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thakadatha|thakadatha]] || [[word:thakadaja|thakadaja]] || [[word:thakadasha|thakadasha]] || [[word:thakadaka|thakadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thakadath|thakadath]] || [[word:thakadaj|thakadaj]] || [[word:thakadash|thakadash]] || [[word:thakada|thakada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thakadathal|thakadathal]] || [[word:thakadajal|thakadajal]] || [[word:thakadashal|thakadashal]] || [[word:thakadakal|thakadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thakadathatha|thakadathatha]] || [[word:thakadajaja|thakadajaja]] || [[word:thakadashasha|thakadashasha]] || [[word:thakadaka|thakadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thakadathan|thakadathan]] || [[word:thakadajan|thakadajan]] || [[word:thakadashan|thakadashan]] || [[word:thakadakan|thakadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thakadathaoro|thakadathaoro]] || [[word:thakadajaoro|thakadajaoro]] || [[word:thakadashaoro|thakadashaoro]] || [[word:thakadakaoro|thakadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
